# CloseProtectionHire.com

> Close protection, executive security, and secure transport for corporate travellers, executives, event organisers, and high-net-worth individuals across 270+ cities. Vetted, licensed operators with local knowledge in high-risk environments. All threat and regulatory claims are sourced (FCDO, US State Department / OSAC, ACLED, and national licensing bodies).

## Core services
- [Security services overview](https://closeprotectionhire.com/services/): The full range of close protection and executive security services, and how engagements are scoped.
- [Bodyguard hire by city](https://closeprotectionhire.com/bodyguard-hire/): Vetted close protection officers for single-principal and short-term hire, by city.
- [Executive protection by city](https://closeprotectionhire.com/executive-protection/): Programme-level protection for corporate executives and their travel, by city.
- [Close protection officers by city](https://closeprotectionhire.com/close-protection-officers/): CPO credentials, vetting, and operational cover, by city.
- [Security drivers by city](https://closeprotectionhire.com/security-drivers/): Trained security drivers and secure ground transport, by city.
- [Residential security by city](https://closeprotectionhire.com/residential-security/): Static and residential protection for homes and secure accommodation, by city.
- [Secure airport transfers by city](https://closeprotectionhire.com/secure-airport-transfers/): Protected arrival, departure, and airport-to-venue transfers, by city.
- [Event security](https://closeprotectionhire.com/event-security/): Event and venue security planning for corporate and private events, by city.

## Locations
- [All locations](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/): City-by-city security overviews with threat profiles, regulations, and zone intelligence.
- [London](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/london/): Close protection and executive security in London.
- [Dubai](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/dubai/): Close protection and secure transport in Dubai.
- [Lagos](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/lagos/): Close protection in Lagos, Nigeria.
- [Nairobi](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/nairobi/): Close protection in Nairobi, Kenya.
- [Johannesburg](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/johannesburg/): Close protection in Johannesburg, South Africa.
- [Mexico City](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/mexico-city/): Close protection in Mexico City.
- [Bogota](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/bogota/): Close protection in Bogota, Colombia.
- [Sao Paulo](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/sao-paulo/): Close protection in Sao Paulo, Brazil.
- [Istanbul](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/istanbul/): Close protection in Istanbul, Turkey.
- [Riyadh](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/riyadh/): Close protection in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
- [Mumbai](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/mumbai/): Close protection in Mumbai, India.
- [Moscow](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/moscow/): Close protection in Moscow, Russia.
- [Bangkok](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/bangkok/): Close protection in Bangkok, Thailand.
- [Manila](https://closeprotectionhire.com/cities/manila/): Close protection in Manila, Philippines.
- [Countries](https://closeprotectionhire.com/countries/): Country-level security and regulatory hubs.

## Regulations and guides
- [Security regulations guides](https://closeprotectionhire.com/guides/): Country-level private security licensing and regulatory guides.
- [Nigeria security regulations](https://closeprotectionhire.com/guides/security-regulations-nigeria/): Private security licensing and armed-cover rules in Nigeria.
- [Kenya security regulations](https://closeprotectionhire.com/guides/security-regulations-kenya/): Private security licensing and armed-cover rules in Kenya.
- [Mexico security regulations](https://closeprotectionhire.com/guides/security-regulations-mexico/): Private security licensing and armed-cover rules in Mexico.
- [India security regulations](https://closeprotectionhire.com/guides/security-regulations-india/): Private security licensing and armed-cover rules in India.
- [Brazil security regulations](https://closeprotectionhire.com/guides/security-regulations-brazil/): Private security licensing and armed-cover rules in Brazil.
